paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions.

There are 2 new news items in the last 24 hours, including announcements from TradingView and FinanzNachrichten.de that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026, to release its second quarter 2026 earnings.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson.
